productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Solid Blue Trousers
description: Composition Navy blue trousers made of a cotton blend fabric, has a flat front with two insert pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures, zipper fly and button closure on the front, loops on the waist to secure a belt and extended hems that can be trimmed to suit the wearer's height Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash gentle Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only; do not iron directly on prints or embellishments Upgrade your style with these woven trousers from indigo nation. The cotton blend fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day, while the classic cut of the trousers makes it perfect for casual and semi-formal wear. Team these with slim fit shirts and tonal leather slip-ons for a well groomed look. Model statistics The product is size 32 on a model of height 6' waist 32”
